reviews.review_description:
This game was the most fun ever. I can’t remember bad memory. Because it’s out shined ￼
By the good ones. I remember watching Youtubers on the new updates and everything else that’s how I got into YouTube. I started making animations on this game and got me to like 800 subscribers. I stop now on the game, but the game is still amazing. hold a place￼ in ￼my heart. ￼￼ I still post, but I moved on to different games. This game fell off but still fun to look back at how good it used to be like the mods. So many good players i met. The only game that  kind of feels like this now is forefront but thank you to the developers you guys might suck ￼now ￼￼￼￼ like you guys are horrible now, but you guys were good at one point and thank you to the community ￼bye

reviews.review_title: Oh how the mighty has fallen
reviews.review_description: No lobbies on the payed version
Au top

These servers have been shut down for i think two years now? Anyways shack beta is legit a top 3 vr game memory for me. Got me into this genre of games (shooter and vr in general) was free and came with a supporting community. I bought the games pre order as soon as i heard about it that is how much i loved it. I will never forget this era, RIP

was introduced by a friend in 2022 i think, couldnt stop playing it. This game has stuck with me through times of hardship. Truly an amazing experience, and culture. I remember that snd glitch, the stick drift, the arcticvr servers. Spell innocent bckwards. I remember when shack didnt have scopes yet, or when the tec9 was still burst fir. Made lots of friends, memories, and knowledge. 100% rec buying the new one!
Its… peak
Best game ever
Such a fun game
So why make it so you cant even play this anymore? is it so we're forced to pay for it?
Oh God no why did you make me pay for this it was so good when it was free but now#makeitfree
I remember playing this beta for hours on end just laughing.All the games modes were so fun especially the ttt game mode and the 7 eleven map it brings back so many good memories.

The paid versions the same but 2021 -2022 the nostalgic things i have remembered the trolles the traitors where has the days gone. This was the best game i Ever played, yet until the others. Rest, In ,Peace, Pavlov BETA.

I remember when my friends asked me to get this game back in like 2022 or 2023 I don’t really remember but this was peak. I also remember when we got mod support and then like a week later the fully released version came out and we couldn’t play this anymore.
Oh where has the time gone….
never refunded a game so fast, this used to be good when it was on side quest, even in my first bot lobby to get used to it again it’s just so bad, just play onward

Pavlov is a great game considering its price, but then it became either 20 or 25 dollars. Based on the beta, I would not want to pay for a game that isn't anywhere near as realistic as I would've expected. I've had the game for a couple of years and I really hoped they fixed most of their issues (Magazines don't show a realistic amount until they're out of ammo, shots to center mass with .338 Lapua don't kill, etc.)

reviews.review_title: One of the best vr shooters
reviews.review_description: One of the best vr shooters that is out for free but my only suggestion is more practice kill house maps. Like for example, a mansion on the beach simulating a swat raid or maybe an apartment building.

reviews.review_title: Please bring back support for this
reviews.review_description: Please it is so nostalgic

I remember back in 2022 or 2023 when I would get onto a map of OG containers or bridge, when there would be whole lobbies just sniping from across the map, I remember those fun days... But now this game is paid, and I'm ultimately satisfied with the amount I was able to play and the memories I made. So long, Pavlov Shack Beta, share some cake with Echo VR will ya?
I used to play this version and this was my first vr game ever played. i will always have fond memories of this version.
I still miss beta.
Bro this game WAS PEAK but of course they moved to a different version that cost money but I mean if you still want to you can still play with bots on this, but it’s just not as fun ￼
I remember playing this with some rando then we became friends it was so good then it became paid so couldn’t play anymore

Best vr game I’ve ever played, played it for years until the beta shut down. Ordering a quest 3 to play the full game and can’t wait to see if it’s improved. Hopefully less children and the same kind of unrestricted player run environment as before.
I remember playing it like 2021 and 2022 when ￼this was peak I do think some players ruined the game matches, but that doesn’t matter since it’s $20 now… now I gotta go grind at work ￼
Farewell pavlov it was fun while you were alive. Becoming paid killed you. R.I.P.

I’m going to re-create the events of WW2 in this game, But I can no longer do that SINCE IT COSTS MONEY, Now I’m torn between this game and another VR game, I’m going to crash out if there isn’t a sale in 1 second.

This game is overall great especially I love first person VR shooters so mechanics are good. I love the reloading it’s just so satisfying also but I would like there to be a free version. I ￼ do remember when it was in the free trial. Its not free anymore for the full version and  I don’t have money so I can’t really spend money on getting this version so right now I’m just on the beta.
This game kept crashing back in early 2022

reviews.review_title: Make it free for the people having beta
reviews.review_description: Make it free for beta

reviews.review_title: This game needs to come back!
reviews.review_description: The beta will always be the goat, and the full version will always be trash. The reason why a say the beta is the goats, is because it was free and it was easy to find custom maps. Now they removed it and they released the full version, with gun skins, and new maps, and it cost money. I thought Pavlov shack was supposed to be a free military shooter, well I guess not. W beta L full version.
I still have this game, i don't have enough money to get the full game so i play this
